decisions.briefing: Markets are firmly risk-on today with NASDAQ leading at +0.9%, favoring growth and tech names. With 4 open slots and $943 in cash, I'm deploying into the four cleanest momentum setups from the screener — MDB, LUNR, PATH, and INFQ — all scoring 90+ with RSI in the ideal 55–70 zone and bullish MACD. Existing positions show no stop-loss concerns, so no sells today.

market_education.summary_en: Today's risk-on session saw the NASDAQ outpace the broader S&P 500, reflecting renewed appetite for growth and technology stocks. This kind of NASDAQ-led day typically signals that investors are comfortable taking on more risk — rotating into higher-beta names like software, AI, and speculative growth. When the NASDAQ outperforms by a meaningful margin (+0.9% vs +0.5%), momentum strategies tend to benefit because existing trends accelerate as capital chases the leaders.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日市場風險偏好明顯升溫，納斯達克指數上漲0.9%，跑贏標普500的0.5%漲幅，反映投資者重新擁抱成長與科技類股。這類由納指領漲的交易日，通常意味著資金正積極輪轉至高貝塔值板塊，包括軟件、人工智能及投機性成長股。當納指顯著跑贏大市時，動能策略往往能受惠於趨勢加速，因為資金持續追逐市場領漲者。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: A 'risk-on' environment means investors are feeling confident and willing to buy riskier assets like growth stocks, small caps, and speculative tech — instead of hiding in 'safe havens' like bonds or gold. You can spot it when the NASDAQ (which is heavy in high-growth tech) outperforms the steadier S&P 500. On risk-on days, momentum strategies thrive because confident buyers push trending stocks even higher.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「風險偏好」（Risk-On）環境意指投資者信心充足，願意買入成長股、小型股及投機性科技股等高風險資產，而非躲進債券或黃金等「避險天堂」。當重倉高增長科技股的納斯達克跑贏較穩健的標普500時，便是辨識此環境的明確信號。在風險偏好的交易日，動能策略往往表現亮眼，因為自信的買盤會將已處於上升趨勢的股票推得更高。
